delete.description: Deletes unreferenced files from disk (Admin only)

get.description: Retrieves all bookings populated with tour and user details (Admin only)
Initializes a Paystack checkout session for a tour or runs a mock checkout session in test mode
Renders an HTML interface for completing test mode payments
Verifies the status of a transaction using the Paystack payment reference

post.description: Receives asynchronous event updates from Paystack (e.g., charge.success)

get.description: Fetches details of a specific booking by ID (Admin only)

patch.description: Updates status of an existing booking (Admin only)

400.description: Invalid input data or booking ID

delete.description: Soft delete the currently authenticated user account

post.description: Sends a password reset token via email if the account exists
Authenticates a user with email and password, returning a JWT token
Invalidates the current JWT access token by adding it to the Redis blacklist

401.description: Not authenticated or invalid token format

get.description: Retrieves details of the currently authenticated user

patch.description: Resets password using the token sent via email and returns a new JWT token

post.description: Creates a new user account with default 'user' role and returns an authentication JWT token

patch.description: Updates authenticated user details (name, email, photo)

400.description: Invalid input or email already in use

patch.description: Allows logged-in users to update their current password and issues a new JWT token

401.description: Current password is wrong or user unauthenticated

get.description: Get list of all reviews with pagination
Get all reviews for a tour
get.summary: Get reviews for a specific tour

patch.description: Update review by ID (only review text and rating)

get.description: Get a paginated, sorted, and filtered list of tours
Calculates distance from latlng to each tour start point
get.summary: Get distances from point to all tour starting locations

get.description: Calculates monthly schedule count for tours
get.summary: Get monthly tour plan for a given year

get.description: Calculates aggregated stats grouped by difficulty

post.description: Create a tour via JSON or multipart/form-data

get.description: Geospatial query to fetch tours near a center point
get.summary: Get tours within a specified radius

get.description: Get a single tour by ID including associated user reviews

delete.description: Delete a tour by ID and remove associated files

post.description: Manually create a new user account (Admin only)

get.description: Get single user details by ID (Admin only)

delete.description: Permanently hard delete a user account from database (Admin only)

patch.description: Update single user record by ID (Admin only)

Bearer.description: Type "Bearer " followed by a space and your token.
Bearer.name: Authorization
